name: Nessus

visual_attributes.texture: smooth human skin on upper body, coarse horse hair on lower body
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: human upper body seamlessly connected to horse body at the waist

functional_attributes.primary_function: mythological creature known for strength and wild nature

domain_specific_functional.role_in_myth: attempted to abduct Deianeira, leading to his death by Heracles
domain_specific_functional.symbolic_role: represents the dangers of unchecked desire

relationships.description: Nessus attempted to abduct Heracles' wife, Deianeira, leading to his death.
Killed by Heracles after attempting to abduct Deianeira.

contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: Represents the duality of human nature and the consequences of betrayal

contrastive_constraints: NOT a peaceful or benevolent creature
